calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment/Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-10-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs CUSHMAN & WAKEFIELD OF CALIFORNIA, INC.,and CUSHMAN & WAKEFIELD U.S., INC.'s Motion For Summary Judgment/Summary Adjudication.

Off calendar. Case settled.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Dec-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Mary Lipscomb, Esq. 310-312-0299 Makarem & Associates for Plaintiff.
Joseph Becerra, Esq. 213-542-8501 Gleason & Favarote for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. Ms. Lipcomb contests and presents arguments; doesn't waive privacy rights, subpoenas reasonably tailored, physical distress. Mr. Becerra opposes wide ranging scope. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Anthony Ports' Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records Issued To Dr. Samuel Aaron Applebaum is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
